description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed bungalow surrounded by landscaped greenery and trees, featuring a clean, geometric design with large glass windows and open outdoor spaces. The structure includes a main building and an attached section, with a spacious backyard that houses a rectangular swimming pool and a wooden deck area. The front facade is characterized by a prominent entryway and a mix of solid and glazed surfaces, while the rear opens up to the pool and garden, offering seamless indoor-outdoor living. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with accents of green from the rooftop garden and surrounding vegetation. The property is enclosed by a low wall and is dotted with various types of trees, providing privacy and shade. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, emphasizing open space, natural light, and integration with the landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a backyard pool, and landscaped greenery, featuring minimalist geometric design and open outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, flat roof, and surrounding trees, with a glimpse of the rooftop garden.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the swimming pool, wooden deck, and open backyard area with trees and greenery.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the large glass windows, pool, and outdoor living spaces, with trees framing the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the entry section, rooftop garden, and a mix of solid and glazed surfaces with trees around.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
